<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-976" location="lines:976-983" -->
```bash
   RESPONSE=$(curl -s -v -X POST "$ENDPOINT?commandId=$COMMAND_ID" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $PROVIDER_TOKEN" \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d "$REQUEST_BODY")
   
   
   echo "$RESPONSE" | jq .

```
